seoTitle: Custom Striped Neoprene Makeup Bag | Fashion Travel Cosmetic Pouch Manufacturer
description:
Designed for modern beauty lovers and lifestyle brands, this custom striped neoprene makeup bag combines fashionable appearance with practical storage performance. Featuring a vibrant blue, pink, and white stripe pattern, the cosmetic pouch creates a youthful and eye-catching visual style suitable for travel collections, beauty products, and seasonal promotions.

Made from soft and flexible neoprene material, this makeup pouch provides a lightweight carrying experience while helping protect cosmetics, skincare products, and personal accessories from daily scratches and impacts. The smooth surface is easy to clean, making it an ideal choice for travel, beach trips, and everyday organization.

The compact rectangular structure offers efficient storage space for makeup brushes, lipstick, foundation, sunscreen, perfume, and other beauty essentials. A durable zipper closure ensures quick access while keeping items securely stored inside.

The large front printing area allows brands to add customized logos, patterns, and promotional graphics, making this neoprene cosmetic pouch an excellent choice for private label brands, beauty companies, hotels, gift suppliers, and retail businesses.

Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides professional OEM and ODM manufacturing services, supporting customized materials, colors, sizes, packaging, and branding solutions to meet global buyers' requirements.
seoDescription: Wholesale custom striped neoprene makeup bag with zipper. Lightweight travel cosmetic pouch featuring fashion printing, durable material, and OEM customization for beauty brands and retailers.
